relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Peter appeals as fellow elder and witness of Messiah's sufferings.
Shepherd willingly, not by compulsion or greed.
Do not lord over the flock; become a pattern.
The chief Shepherd gives unfading glory.
Humility under Divine hand becomes lifting in season.
All anxiety is cast upon the One who cares.
Be sober and awake before the adversarial roar.
Resist firm in trust with the worldwide siblinghood.
The Divine of all grace restores, establishes, strengthens, and grounds.
Silvanus carries testimony to true grace. Stand in it.
The chosen community in Babylon and Mark greet them.
Love greets; peace rests in Messiah.

contemplative_note: 1 Peter 5 closes with anti-domination shepherding, anxiety held by Divine care, sober vigilance, and grace that restores and grounds.
